explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 33 from a base nutrition score of 33. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: brings a clean fruit identity
topPros.explanation: It still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

topPros.title: ingredient simplicity is hard to argue with
topPros.explanation: Whole-fruit clarity is part of the category appeal.

topPros.title: usually beats ultra-processed sweet snacks
topPros.explanation: That replacement value matters in real life.

topCons.title: protein contribution is tiny
topCons.explanation: That is normal for fruit, but it still limits nutritional breadth.

topCons.title: easy to eat quickly when it is very sweet
topCons.explanation: That can blur the line between light and sugar-heavy portions.

topCons.title: sugar can climb fast
topCons.explanation: A lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet.

closing.summary: Pomegranate does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
